summary: Promoted ADR 0311 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.142` and platform version `0.130.90` after replaying the repo-managed cmdk command palette and docs-backed search helper from the latest origin/main baseline at repository version `0.177.141` and platform version `0.130.89`, verifying focused contract tests, the refreshed exact-main Windmill converge, and the live operator-admin palette surface end to end while preserving the ADR 0316 journey analytics capabilities already live on main; when `origin/main` advanced again with publication-only generated surfaces, the branch rebased to that newer head and reran the shared truth generation plus final repository, remote, and pre-push gates before publication.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported the release-blocker gate `met` on the `0.177.141` / `0.130.89` baseline, the exact-main protected-surface cut to repository version `0.177.142` is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-release-status-r2.json`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-release-dry-run-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-release-manager-r1.txt`, and the later latest-main refresh still reported `Unreleased notes: 0` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-release-status-r4.json` plus `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-release-dry-run-r4.txt`.

verification.check: Focused contracts and raw-app compile on the exact-main tree
verification.observed: The exact-main tree passed `32` focused Python tests, the raw-app `npm ci` plus `npx tsc --noEmit` bundle check, script `py_compile`, `make syntax-check-windmill`, and `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-windmill`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-focused-contracts-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-raw-app-tsc-r3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-py-compile-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-syntax-check-windmill-r3.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-preflight-converge-windmill-r3.txt`.

The refreshed exact-main `make converge-windmill env=production` replay completed successfully with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=329 changed=47 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=93 changed=2 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-converge-windmill-r5.txt`.

verification.check: Live command palette helper and operator-admin surface
verification.observed: The post-replay helper run returned `{"status":"ok","query":"totp","count":5}` with ADR and runbook matches, the Windmill API reports `CE v1.662.0`, and the live raw-app summary now records `latest_version: 72` with `has_command_palette_import`, `has_command_palette_backend`, `has_command_palette_cta`, `has_command_palette_file`, and `policy_has_command_palette_search` all true, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-command-palette-search-r6.json`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-windmill-api-version-r2.json`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-live-app-summary-r4.json`.

verification.check: Final repository automation and publication gates on the latest-main refresh
verification.observed: After rebasing to the later `origin/main` publication-only generated-surface refresh, the branch reran the shared generators and passed `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-agent-standards-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-workstream-surfaces-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-validate-data-models-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-validate-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0311-mainline-pre-push-gate-r2.txt`.

notes: This exact-main receipt is the canonical proof for ADR 0311 on repository version `0.177.142` and platform version `0.130.90`.

The earlier branch-local receipt remains preserved as historical evidence for the pre-integration replay and the concurrent drift it detected on shared verification surfaces before the exact-main promotion succeeded.
The final live operator-admin app bundle now carries both the ADR 0311 command palette and the ADR 0316 journey analytics contracts on the same private Windmill surface at live app version `72`.
The final publication pass rebased onto the later ADR 0319 generated-surface closeout on `origin/main` and reran the shared truth plus remote publication gates before pushing.
